subject: [PATCH v7 06/20] nfsd: make nfsd4_callback_ops->prepare operation bool return

2026-06-16.patch_summary: This patch modifies the nfsd4_callback_ops->prepare operation to return a boolean value indicating whether processing should continue or not. The operation is used in various callback scenarios, such as CB_NOTIFY operations, where allocation failures need to be handled by stopping further processing. The changes affect several files and functions within the NFS server code, ensuring that the prepare operation returns true if processing can continue and false otherwise.
